segments.text: If Chef had kept it going, they'd eat the fair, but
segments.original_text: シェフ継続してたら空前食らってますけど

segments.text: By stopping Chef at just one
segments.original_text: シェフ1個でやめたことによって

segments.text: Miya was able to get the next side B
segments.original_text: Miya側が次横Bを出す権利を得たっていう

segments.text: Chef's hitstop jams up the fair
segments.original_text: シェフのヒットストップで空前突っかかっちゃうんで

full_text: If Chef had kept it going, they'd eat the fair, but By stopping Chef at just one Miya was able to get the next side B Chef's hitstop jams up the fair That's the play

corrections.corrected: 空前食らってますけど

corrections.original: 右側側が次横気を出す権利を得るたっていう
corrections.corrected: Miya側が次横Bを出す権利を得たっていう
